title: system_info/1 BIF — VM introspection
purpose: `erlang:system_info/1` returns information about the running VM — scheduler count, process count, word size, OTP version, etc. OTP's `init`, `code`, and `application` modules call it during startup. Without it, loading OTP modules that query VM properties fails.
task: Implement system_info/1 as a BIF with the subset of items needed by OTP libraries.

requirements.title: system_info/1 BIF with core items
requirements.spec: Register `erlang:system_info/1`. Returns a value based on the item atom.
acceptance: Test: each supported item returns the expected type

requirements.title: Scheduler and process count access
requirements.spec: system_info needs access to scheduler and process table metrics. Add accessors to SharedState.
acceptance: `SharedState::scheduler_count() -> usize` returns normal scheduler thread count
`SharedState::atom_count() -> usize` returns current atom table size
These are read-only, lock-free where possible (use existing DashMap::len() etc.)
Test: verify counts match expected values

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement all ~60 system_info items — only the subset needed by OTP stdlib
SHALL return beamr-specific values where appropriate (e.g., otp_release returns a beamr version string, not an Erlang version)
SHALL NOT implement runtime-modifiable system flags — read-only queries only
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
